name: @lizflow/license
description: LizFlow runtime entitlement, lease, and workflow attestation SDK

scripts.release:dry-run: npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish --dry-run
scripts.release:patch: npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish --dry-run && npm version patch && npm publish && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish --dry-run && npm version minor && npm publish && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish --dry-run && npm version major && npm publish && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
